name: MJ Hegar Update
subject: 15 minutes ago
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
quick update before filing

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890907/7f51f7bc/4a4c7679/4ef0f6e5/396378777/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter -- quick update. I'm knee-deep in spreadsheets and as of 15 minutes ago, we're behind on hitting our weekly fundraising numbers. MJ is _officially_ filing for Senate tomorrow, and we need to start in a good spot.

We've only got a few hours to catch up, and we've got $2,118 to go. I have to check -- can you dig deep to pitch in? Here's a link you can use so your contribution counts immediately toward our goal: **[https://mjfortexas.com/pre-filing/Peter](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890907/7f51f7bc/4a4c7679/4ef0f6e4/396378777/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYwMSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191208.3nd__601__&amount=10&recurring=true")**.

I'm hoping I can give MJ some good news as we head in to file tomorrow! Thanks so much for everything.

Taylor Klos
TX Finance Director, MJ for Texas

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890907/7f51f7bc/4a4c7679/4ef0f6e4/396378777/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYwMSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191208.3nd__601__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

name: Sara 2020
subject: UPDATE: Mitch McConnell just launched an attack ad against Sara Gideon. Will you make a contribution now to help us fight back?
body:
We're taking on more than just Susan Collins.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fb2/4bef7a87/6a6342a4/287fe2d4/3902676691/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends,
**Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans just launched an attack ad against us.**
Our ability to fight back depends on people like you, because the overwhelming majority of the donations we receive come from people giving small amounts. And that means we have to ask:
[**Rush a $3 contribution so we can fight back against Mitch McConnell 's new attack ad. We need your help to set the record straight. **](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fb2/4bef7a87/6a6342a4/287fe2ab/3902676691/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMDgtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191208-2-full")
We're not just taking on Susan Collins in this election. We are also taking on the entire national Republican establishment and powerful industries and special interest groups that will spend whatever it takes to preserve the status quo.
It's going to take a large grassroots team to beat them all. That's where you come in.
Thanks for your fight,
Team Sara
******[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fb2/4bef7a87/6a6342a4/287fe2ab/3902676691/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMDgtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191208-2-full")******

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails please **[click here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fb2/4bef7a87/6a6342a4/287fe2aa/3902676691/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/receive-fewer-emails/")**. If you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fb2/4bef7a87/6a6342a4/287fe2a9/3902676691/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fb2/4bef7a87/6a6342a4/287fe2a8/3902676691/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

body:
My team just called me to check in before we close the books on our weekly grassroots goal at midnight, and we're so close to reaching it.

name: Cory Booker
subject: The American people deserve justice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
The House is drafting articles of impeachment against President Trump.
| | |
---
| Team, A few days ago, Speaker Pelosi announced that the House will begin preparing articles of impeachment. After what we've heard in public testimony these past few weeks, this is clearly the right path forward. The evidence presented before the House Intelligence Committee was both deeply upsetting and damning. Donald Trump took an oath to preserve, protect, and defend the Constitution -- and he has abdicated that responsibility. **[Sign your name if you agree that it's necessary to move forward with the impeachment process.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/support-the-impeachment-inquiry?source=em_pet_20191208_CB_20191208-pet-CB-EM3-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** I'm thankful to Speaker Pelosi and House leadership for handling this process with the seriousness it demands. As I've said before, this is a sad moment for our democracy. It brings me no joy that we're in the midst of the impeachment process for an American president. If and when an impeachment trial begins in the Senate, I will uphold my Constitutional duty to ensure a fair trial and impartially weigh the evidence presented. **[Add your name here if you support Speaker Pelosi's decision to start drafting articles of impeachment.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/support-the-impeachment-inquiry?source=em_pet_20191208_CB_20191208-pet-CB-EM3-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** The American people deserve justice. Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/support-the-impeachment-inquiry?source=em_pet_20191208_CB_20191208-pet-CB-EM3-actives_actives_button&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c50/5fca0d19/7817c68f/291c89b7/698738309/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c50/5fca0d19/7817c68f/291c89b6/698738309/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c50/5fca0d19/7817c68f/291c89b5/698738309/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c50/5fca0d19/7817c68f/291c89b4/698738309/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c50/5fca0d19/7817c68f/291c89b3/698738309/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c50/5fca0d19/7817c68f/291c89b7/698738309/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

subject: quick request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Since we emailed you earlier, we'll get straight to the point!

This week, we announced our plan to hold 50 town halls across New Hampshire in the final 10 weeks before the primary! We're opening offices and hiring field staff, but we're still falling short of our $15,OOO midnight fundraising goal.

[Michael refuses to take contributions from corporate special interests, and he doesn't have a billionaire's bank account - this is a people-powered campaign.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba975/134673f2/90b9e23/6997b393/1674725842/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-dec?refcode=EM_FR_B2_120819_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Team Scholten
subject: Sec. Perdue: Corporate Ag’s Ally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Peter --

When our farmers suffer, America suffers. And right now, American farms are $426.6 billion in debt. As farmers are squeezed out of business, the ripple effects begin: the local economy shrinks, schools consolidate, grocery stores close, and kids move away and don’t come back.

The government is only making matters worse. In fact, time and again, Secretary of Agriculture Sonny Perdue backs corporate farms over everyday farmers, refusing to stand up to big ag or fight for the little guy. As a result of “get big or get off the farm policies” and corporate consolidation, farm bankruptcies, farm loan delinquency rates, and farmer suicides are rising.

**[If you agree that it’s time to help our farmers get back on their feet, sign our petition today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12689157/130847113/-1854460898?mscode=em19_191209_farmbankruptcypt&refcode=em19_191209_farmbankruptcypt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTM1ZDdjMS1hZDFhLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QWUc_9d-evUcyqZnznOzqyR4gmfiZcc9oqCXOmOrP8Y=&emci=15cab1a6-3e18-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=c535d7c1-ad1a-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013)** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12689158/130847114/-1854460898?mscode=em19_191209_farmbankruptcypt&refcode=em19_191209_farmbankruptcypt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTM1ZDdjMS1hZDFhLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QWUc_9d-evUcyqZnznOzqyR4gmfiZcc9oqCXOmOrP8Y=&emci=15cab1a6-3e18-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=c535d7c1-ad1a-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013) Farmers don’t need much -- they don’t want handouts. Truth be told, they just want a fair shot at making a profit and providing for their families. They are some of the most resilient, determined, hard-working, and creative people -- and all they need is a little help.

Here’s where we can start:
* Enforcing our antitrust laws, and preventing corporate consolidation that leaves farmers with few options and thinner margins, and pushes them out of business.
* Securing trade deals that tackle the issues before us and don’t use our farmers, manufacturers, and consumers as collateral damage.
* Giving younger generations and minority farmers the tools they need for success.
* Paying farmers for their environmental services and incentivizing sustainable techniques that will promote soil health, ensure clean water and safe food, and protect our environment.
* Bringing farmers to the table for climate change solutions.

Without action, our farmers won’t make it. But that doesn’t mean we should give up now. We need to have their backs and fight for fairness in farming.

When folks in Washington talk about trade policy, farm bills, and tax breaks, they think of our farmers as bargaining chips, not as people and families who deserve a fair shot.

Once elected, J.D. will be a loud, strong voice for our farmers -- and **will stand tall with them every day.**

**[Will you join us and stand with farmers? clean_body: Peter -- When our farmers suffer, America suffers. And right now, American farms are $426.6 billion in debt. As farmers are squeezed out of business, the ripple effects begin: the local economy shrinks, schools consolidate, grocery stores close, and kids move away and don’t come back. The government is only making matters worse. In fact, time and again, Secretary of Agriculture Sonny Perdue backs corporate farms over everyday farmers, refusing to stand up to big ag or fight for the little guy. As a result of “get big or get off the farm policies” and corporate consolidation, farm bankruptcies, farm loan delinquency rates, and farmer suicides are rising. Farmers don’t need much -- they don’t want handouts. Truth be told, they just want a fair shot at making a profit and providing for their families. They are some of the most resilient, determined, hard-working, and creative people -- and all they need is a little help. Here’s where we can start: Enforcing our antitrust laws, and preventing corporate consolidation that leaves farmers with few options and thinner margins, and pushes them out of business. Securing trade deals that tackle the issues before us and don’t use our farmers, manufacturers, and consumers as collateral damage. Giving younger generations and minority farmers the tools they need for success. Paying farmers for their environmental services and incentivizing sustainable techniques that will promote soil health, ensure clean water and safe food, and protect our environment. Bringing farmers to the table for climate change solutions. Without action, our farmers won’t make it. But that doesn’t mean we should give up now. We need to have their backs and fight for fairness in farming. When folks in Washington talk about trade policy, farm bills, and tax breaks, they think of our farmers as bargaining chips, not as people and families who deserve a fair shot. Once elected, J.D. will be a loud, strong voice for our farmers -- and will stand tall with them every day. ** Thanks for standing with us, Team Scholten =

clean_body: This is a historic moment. "" Friends, Last week, the House Judiciary Committee held their first impeachment hearing. Soon, Susan Collins could be a juror on impeachment - which is a problem because we know that she's just another reliable vote for Mitch McConnell and Trump in the Senate. She proved that when she cast a deciding vote to confirm Brett Kavanaugh despite all the evidence that showed he was not fit for a lifetime appointment to the Supreme Court. We can 't trust Senator Collins to be an impartial juror - so it's time to replace her with someone we CAN trust. "" It's never been more important to have the right people representing us in Washington. Sincerely, Team Sara "" **** ""** Sara Gideon for Maine PO Box 812 South Freeport, ME 04078

name: Booker HQ
subject: What we'll be missing on stage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Friend, If Cory doesn't make it onto the December debate stage, it's not a stretch to say that it'd be a huge loss for the Democratic Party. Without Cory, the stage will be missing one of the strongest advocates for criminal justice reform in our party; we'll be missing the person who led the presidential field on gun licensing; we'll miss Cory's unique and transformative plan to end the racial wealth gap; and we'll have no one on stage reminding us that beating Donald Trump is the floor, not the ceiling, of what we must achieve in this election, and that if we want to create lasting change, we have to fight with love, empathy, and compassion. **[If Cory's voice is one you believe we need to have on the debate stage this month, then please make a donation to this campaign and help us reach the $500,000 we need to launch TV ads.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate-adsfund?refcode=em_fr_20191209_BHQ_20191209-fr-BHQ-EM1-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** In the last few days, we've seen a huge swell of support to ensure that Cory is on the debate stage, and I just want to take a moment to say that we're all so grateful. We've hit the donor threshold already, and now we just need to meet the polling threshold. Some of you may be wondering how your donation can help us get there -- well, here's the plan put as simply as I can: YOUR DONATION -> MORE ADS TO GET OUT OUR MESSAGE -> BUMP IN THE POLLS -> QUALIFY FOR THE DEBATE **[We haven't seen any qualifying polls recently but hope there will be several this week, so this is an incredibly important time for us to be running full steam ahead. Make a donation right now to help secure Cory's spot on stage.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate-adsfund?refcode=em_fr_20191209_BHQ_20191209-fr-BHQ-EM1-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thanks. Now let's do this,
Jenna Jenna Lowenstein
Deputy Campaign Manager
Cory 2020 [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate-adsfund?refcode=em_fr_20191209_BHQ_20191209-fr-BHQ-EM1-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

body:
December 31st marks the final FEC deadline before people across the country start caucusing and voting in the Democratic primary. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b02a/45c30650/11dbf0714/66f83e30/3664620468/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

We'll get right to it: your support is incredibly crucial right now. **Here's why:**

December 31st marks the final FEC deadline before people across the country start caucusing and voting in the Democratic primary.

All eyes will be on our fundraising report to see if our campaign has grown support in Pennsylvania and across the country. This is our chance to show the true strength of our grassroots movement to the political pundits and powerful special interests who are hoping to see our momentum fizzle out.

**That means that we're relying on people from Pennsylvania chipping in for the first time this month to ensure that our next FEC fundraising report is our strongest yet.**

[**Will you donate $2 or anything you can right now to ensure that we start 2020 off strong?**](https://elizabethwarren.com/ew-sticker?source=EMM29F_EGR_GRM_C_20191209_V1S3_P_T2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&refcode=EMM29F_EGR_GRM_C_20191209_V1S3_P_T2)

Here's why: December 31st marks the final FEC deadline before people across the country start caucusing and voting in the Democratic primary. subject: If we don’t stand by Andrew in this moment...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=4333%2E377263%2EQIBMK3) Yang Gang --

Here is the truth: **If we don’t stand by Andrew in this moment, the only people who make the December debate stage will be a billionaire and establishment politicians.** [Please, pitch in $10 or as much as you can to ensure his voice and ideas are on that stage.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19009?t=5&akid=4333%2E377263%2EQIBMK3)

We know they don’t have the answers to the greatest challenges of our time. They want to argue over the same old fights Washington has been having for decades.

**It’s time to rewrite the rules -- not just complain about how they’re written.**

[If you’re with Andrew in this fight, we need you to give as much as you can right now when it matters most. Pitch in $10 or more to stand with Andrew.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19009?t=8&akid=4333%2E377263%2EQIBMK3) | [Pitch In](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19009?t=7&akid=4333%2E377263%2EQIBMK3)

Yang2020

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Lindstrom?=
subject: Did Wagle Put Kansas Up for Sale?
body:
Ethics Scandal, Ignores Conflicts in Pursuit of Cash

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/c441e5711136/did-wagle-put-kansas-up-for-sale?e=41f8e27552)

Dear Friend,

A lengthy investigative article released yesterday raises yet more questions about Susan Wagle and cozy influence peddling in Topeka to finance her US Senate campaign. From Wagle’s own spokesman:

“Lobbyists giving money to Wagle’s campaign are personal friends...she’s been in the legislature nearly three decades.”
(Read the investigative article here (https://www.kansascity.com/news/politics-government/article238089879.html?utm_source=Lindstrom+for+Senate&utm_campaign=dd08ad2d44-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_09_04_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_fcd34823bf-dd08ad2d44-180644441) )

You’ll recall that just last week, I released a proposal to stop this kind of cozy influence, and backed it up with a strict term limits proposal, ethics reforms and a strong deterence against wasteful spending for special interests.

I need your help to overcome the lobbyist money machine that is working to buy our Republican primary. Now is the time for all of us as Kansans to push back and keep this US Senate seat working for Kansas families.

DONATE TODAY (https://secure.anedot.com/lindstrom-for-senate/donate?utm_source=Lindstrom+for+Senate&utm_campaign=dd08ad2d44-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_09_04_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_fcd34823bf-dd08ad2d44-180644441)
Together, we can get the job done. Please be sure to cast your vote for term limits by adding your name to our growing list of Kansans endorsing this effort. Change won’t come easy, but the more of our voices that are raised up, the louder and more effective our call for term limits will be. Click below to add your name - your voice!

ADD MY NAME AS A TERM LIMITS VOTER! (https://lindstromforsenate.com/term-limits-pledge/?utm_source=Lindstrom+for+Senate&utm_campaign=dd08ad2d44-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_09_04_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_fcd34823bf-dd08ad2d44-180644441)
DONATE TODAY (https://secure.anedot.com/lindstrom-for-senate/donate?utm_source=Lindstrom+for+Senate&utm_campaign=dd08ad2d44-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_09_04_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_fcd34823bf-dd08ad2d44-180644441)

Thank you for standing with me as we take a stand together for our families and our nation!

Dave

P.S. Don't forget to follow us online: www.lindstromforsenate.com and on social media @LindstromforKS

============================================================
** Twitter (https://twitter.com/lindstromforks?utm_source=Lindstrom+for+Senate&utm_campaign=dd08ad2d44-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_09_04_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_fcd34823bf-dd08ad2d44-180644441)

| | Hello Peter, **What we did** : In 2018, it was our mission at When Democrats Turn Out to support House challengers in critical races and increase voter turnout in swing districts \-- and it paid off. Democrats retook the House majority and are standing up to the corruption of the Trump administration. **What we 're doing**: In 2020, we're taking the fight to the Senate. WDTO is working non-stop to increase Democratic voter turnout for key races in Maine, Arizona, North Carolina, South Carolina, Colorado, Iowa, Kentucky, and Georgia \-- they are all within grasp if we work hard together. Kicking Mitch McConnell out of the Senate and making headway on healthcare, climate change, and immigration are all within reach!! **Why we need you** : We know Republicans will do anything to suppress the vote, legally or otherwise, with their piles of dark money and Trump campaign funds. We're mobilizing voters in those critical states and supporting the campaigns that are going to win us back the Senate, but we can't do it alone. We don't take money from corporations \-- we rely 100% on grassroots donations. And that means we need you. Right now, we're falling short of our December fundraising to cover these key races, and if we don't turn this around before the holidays, we're going to have to scale back going into the most important election of our lifetime. [**Can you please step up and give anything you can, even just $5, to help us secure victory in 2020?**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdca3/6e9863e8/17147cbd/1db0bb90/4105919255/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191209a.ND&refcode2=fnOnL4H9Zt06GV1dc2CW") Thank you for your support! It's Democrats like you who will help us win and restore democracy in America. name: MJ Hegar
subject: Today I officially filed to run for U.S. Senate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
I want to be clear: I couldn't have gotten here without your help.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890903/7f51f7bc/4a4eeac3/4ef0f73d/1701253149/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890903/7f51f7bc/4a4eeac3/4ef0f73c/1701253149/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYwMCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-filingdaygoal?refcode=email_20191209.1nd__600__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---
Big news, Peter:

Moments ago, I officially filed to run for U.S. Senate. I want to be clear: I couldn't have gotten here without you.

We don't have much time left to make sure I'm the candidate who goes up against Sen. Cornyn next November. **Early voting in the primary starts on February 18 -- just over two months from now!** It's crunch time, and I need your help more than ever to build the campaign that's going to _win_ for the people of Texas.

**With no time to waste, we're setting a Filing Day Goal of $10,000 to ensure we have the resources to go all the way.[Will you pitch in now to help us get there?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890903/7f51f7bc/4a4eeac3/4ef0f73c/1701253149/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYwMCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-filingdaygoal?refcode=email_20191209.1nd__600__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
**[**RUSH A DONATION**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890903/7f51f7bc/4a4eeac3/4ef0f73c/1701253149/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYwMCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-filingdaygoal?refcode=email_20191209.1nd__600__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
Sen. Cornyn is one of the most vulnerable senators in the country and this is shaping up to be a blockbuster race, just like _The Dallas Morning News_ predicted. From facing down the Taliban to taking on the Pentagon, **I've taken on a lot of tough fights in my life. I know I'm the candidate that can take the fight to Sen. Cornyn and _win_ , but I need your help to do it.**

In order to take on Sen. Cornyn directly, I've got to be able to travel to hear from voters, spread my message across Texas, and keep building our grassroots organization from the ground up. All that work takes resources, and we're running out of time.

**So please pitch in before midnight to help us hit our $10,000 Filing Day goal so we can start our first day as an _official_ Senate campaign strong and keep building the momentum we need to beat Senator Cornyn:**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---

******[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890903/7f51f7bc/4a4eeac3/4ef0f732/1701253149/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYwMCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-filingdaygoal?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191209.1nd__600__&amount=10")******
****[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890903/7f51f7bc/4a4eeac3/4ef0f731/1701253149/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYwMCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-filingdaygoal?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191209.1nd__600__&amount=25")****
****[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890903/7f51f7bc/4a4eeac3/4ef0f730/1701253149/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYwMCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-filingdaygoal?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191209.1nd__600__&amount=50")****
******[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890903/7f51f7bc/4a4eeac3/4ef0f737/1701253149/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYwMCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-filingdaygoal?refcode=email_20191209.1nd__600__")******
\-- MJ

I need you in this fight. |

---
_**PELOSI: "WE WILL IMPEACH"**_
Friend,

**I DID NOTHING WRONG.**

The Do Nothing Democrats had a historically bad day the other day and now Nancy is trying to cover up for it by calling for her minions to proceed with **Articles of Impeachment.**

_They recently announced that they are going to seek to IMPEACH me over NOTHING._ This means that beyond the important and seldom used act of IMPEACHMENT, it will be used routinely to ATTACK future Presidents that Party leaders don't agree with.

**This is not what our Founders had in mind.** The Democrats have NO impeachment case and are demeaning our great Country at YOUR expense. But, nothing matters to them - they have gone absolutely insane.

_**TELL ME NANCY: HOW CAN YOU IMPEACH A PRESIDENT THAT DID NOTHING WRONG?**_

Nancy and her corrupt party have proven that there is no line they won't cross to try and _STEAL the 2020 Election._ The biggest WITCH HUNT in the history of politics has reached a critical point, and I need YOU to be on the right side of history with me.
---
|
The _DC Swamp_ wants impeachment. The _Hollywood Elites_ want impeachment. The _Fake News_ wants impeachment. The _Deep State_ wants impeachment. _Foreign enemies_ want impeachment. The _Establishment_ wants impeachment. They all HATE you, and that's why they want to steal your vote.

It's US against THEM. Make no mistake this is a war, and a war we must win to save the United States of America.

I'm calling on my **most FIERCE and LOYAL defenders** to step up to the front lines of this Impeachment war and show the Left that we will NEVER stop fighting.
**These next 24 HOURS are so CRITICAL, that I 've activated an EMERGENCY DOUBLE-MATCH on ALL CONTRIBUTIONS.**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: filed in Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | It's official! We're on the ballot for the presidential primary in Texas on Super Tuesday.
[If you want to be a part of our movement to build an America where everyone counts, please consider making a contribution today. >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc89c/3eb3e2fc/68a6b7aa/744d160c/907464355/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+If+you+want+to+be+a+part+of+our+movement&utm_campaign=20191209_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191209_em_fr_b1_castro_all") [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc89c/3eb3e2fc/68a6b7aa/744d160b/907464355/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=20191209_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191209_em_fr_b1_castro_all") We're filing to get on ballots across the country, but it was particularly special to file in my home state today. Not too far from where I grew up on the west side of San Antonio - I filed to run for President of the United States. The electoral map is going to be different this time. We need to make sure we nominate a candidate who has the ability to win in places previously thought out of reach. The coalition we'll have to assemble will need to be broad and inclusive. [This campaign is about leaving no one behind so we can all get ahead and have the opportunity to reach our dreams. Join the campaign today -- contribute now to help us build this coalition. >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc89c/3eb3e2fc/68a6b7aa/744d160a/907464355/VEsF/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=3+-+This+campaign+is+about+leaving+no+one+be&utm_campaign=20191209_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191209_em_fr_b1_castro_all")
Thank you,
Julian

| | [](julianforthefuture.com)
---
| | Paid for by Julian for the Future
---
| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: ‘No Wonder Democrats Are Doing Their Best to Ensure That All the Headlines Are About Impeachment’
body:
"‘Stellar.’ ‘Blowout.’ ‘Blockbuster.’ That’s how even left-leaning analysts described Friday’s stunning jobs report." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7e43ac8a76&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **‘No Wonder Democrats Are Doing Their Best to Ensure That All the Headlines Are About Impeachment’**

“‘Stellar.’ ‘Blowout.’ ‘Blockbuster.’ That’s how even left-leaning analysts described Friday’s stunning jobs report. The US economy continues to steam ahead under President Trump, despite a global slowdown — with big gains for Main Street, not just Wall Street,” the _New York Post_ editorial board writes.

“The gains are broad and deep. Minorities continue to see record or near-record low unemployment rates . . . And recent research from Bloomberg News shows that the Trump-era recovery has most benefited those in the lowest 40 percent of incomes.”

No wonder Democrats are so desperate to change the narrative, the editors write.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f47745368f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “As Adam Schiff’s kangaroo court has unfolded, with Republicans barred from presenting defense witnesses or exculpatory materials and with much of the proceedings held in secret, it’s becoming clearer that the Republicans’ charge of a ‘show trial’ is gaining merit,” Robert Knight writes in [_The Washington Times_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=54ceed7821&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| Years ago, Democrats warned Americans about the dangers of snooping tactics. “That was then. Today, House Intelligence Chairman Adam Schiff not only employs the power of the surveillance state to smear his colleagues and press his political agenda, he has set a number of dangerous precedents by ‘unmasking’ his political rivals,” David Harsanyi writes in the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b32e81de80&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Fighting leukemia from her bed at Children’s National Hospital, Caoilinn McLane, then 15, met the first lady in 2017.” On Friday, they saw each other again—“when McLane was given the honor of introducing Mrs. Trump when she returned to the hospital to continue the tradition of first ladies reading to patients at holiday time,” Darlene Superville reports for [_The Associated Press_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e1c9c94dae&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Congress struck a tentative bipartisan agreement that would authorize 12 weeks of paid parental leave for all federal workers, in a potentially historic deal negotiated with the White House.” White House Legislative Affairs Director Eric Ueland said that Ivanka Trump played a key role in making it happen, Lindsay Wise and Michael Bender report in [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=922ab51bed&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=564cc0fcfc&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=96517d935f&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=aea55cae61)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

subject: Just stepped out of today’s hearing
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | Patriot,
Today we witnessed another sham hearing on impeachment. House Democrats have made it clear that they don't care about the facts...all they care about is removing President Trump from office.
The star witness, Adam Schiff, didn't even bother showing up, even though he wrote the report that lays out the faux "facts" of impeachment. Jerry Nadler also refused to schedule a Minority Hearing, even though it's clearly written in the rules. It just confirms that the Democrats will stop at nothing until the President is impeached.
I need your support to end this circus. We need you to act fast in order to defend our President from these baseless, partisan attacks. name: OurRevolution.com
subject: [Survey] Do you support free college and health care for every American?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
| Take our survey now to let us know where you stand-> Friend,

Bernie Sanders and Elizabeth Warren are both campaigning for universal policies like health care for all and free college for all, and they're proving that many 2020 Democratic presidential primary voters are ready to vote for lasting systemic change.

But some Democratic presidential candidates have their sights set a bit lower.

[**Do you support universal public policies like Medicare for All and free college for all? Take our two-minute survey now to let us know where you stand ->**](https://go.ourrevolution.%3D/?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://go.ourrevolution.com/1219-survey?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=1+-+Do+you+support+universal+public+policies&utm_campaign=OR_EM_SV_2YR_191209_1_1&source=OR_EM_SV_2YR_191209_1_1")

Pete Buttigieg is currently running ads in Iowa attacking the idea of free college for all. He says we should "make college **affordable** for everybody" to avoid "turning off half the country" by making it free for every American.

Similarly, his health care plan -- Medicare for All Who Want It -- protects private insurance companies while denying subsidies for non-citizens.

[**Answer our survey to let us know if you agree with Pete Buttigieg that policies like "Medicare for All Who Want It" are bold enough->**](https://go.ourrevolution.%3D/?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://go.ourrevolution.com/1219-survey?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=2+-+Answer+our+survey+to+let+us+know+if+you+&utm_campaign=OR_EM_SV_2YR_191209_1_1&source=OR_EM_SV_2YR_191209_1_1") **[Answer Here](https://go.ourrevolution.%3D/?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://go.ourrevolution.com/1219-survey?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=3+-+Answer+Here&utm_campaign=OR_EM_SV_2YR_191209_1_1&source=OR_EM_SV_2YR_191209_1_1")** Some candidates are proud to fund their campaigns with the help of billionaires, but then draw the line at universal programs that could potentially benefit the wealthy.

But the truth is, public programs like Social Security and free K-12 education are successful because of their universality -- that's why Our Revolution is fighting back against these Republican talking points.

**Through our Organize to Win 2020 campaign, we 're organizing thousands of working-class voters in states like Iowa and Indiana to ensure that voters hear the truth about progressive policies like Medicare for All and free college for all.**

[**Take our survey now to let us know what you think about these policies ->**](https://go.ourrevolution.%3D/?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://go.ourrevolution.com/1219-survey?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=4+-+Take+our+survey+now+to+let+us+know+what+&utm_campaign=OR_EM_SV_2YR_191209_1_1&source=OR_EM_SV_2YR_191209_1_1")

Thanks for speaking out,

Our Revolution

---

Joint Legislative Fiscal Committee Meeting Friday, December 13th!
---
Help Us Encourage Democrats to Accept $46 Million Grant for NH Schools!
Next Friday the [Joint Legislative Fiscal Committee](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMzA3MzM3OTUwOTg3NTU2NTkxJmM9ZDlyMCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMDA2MTg5NTImZD1hM282cTFm.ox9_274J1Ssr1GFH7A6QOcNHSYDi-ZbA_BA59bgqU_w) is meeting for the first time since they unexpectedly chose to block a $46 million Federal grant to create more innovation in New Hampshire Public Schools! Help us encourage them to reconsider this ridiculous, politically motivated decision! subject: Holding isn't up for a challenge.

Friend,

For two years, Republican George Holding has represented North Carolina's 2nd District in Congress--if you can call it representing.

But now, after district lines have been redrawn and made this district harder for him to win, **he has said he may not be pursuing reelection.**

**Looks like Holding isn't up for a challenge.**

Friend, with or without George Holding, we are still in a four-candidate primary with resources stretched between four campaigns.

The money we raise right now will go to critical voter outreach, like digital ads, field offices, and even supplies for volunteers, like clipboards and pencils.

[**We are setting a goal of reaching 55 donors to Monika's campaign today. Will you help us raise the funds we need to tell more voters why Monika is the best choice for the 2nd District?**](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d93b/7dfbb003/42a8ab30/5527bdb8/1661319698/VEsE/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191209_em_preprimary&recurring=auto&refcode2=CTA1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=2+-+We+are+setting+a+goal+of+reaching+55+don&utm_campaign=rtw_20191209_em_preprimary&source=rtw_20191209_em_preprimary") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5»](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d93b/7dfbb003/42a8ab30/5527bdb9/1661319698/VEsF/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191209_em_preprimary&recurring=auto&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode2=EL5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=3+-+5raquo&utm_campaign=rtw_20191209_em_preprimary&source=rtw_20191209_em_preprimary")

name: Rob Portman
subject: Fighting Addiction
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Portman for Senate Committee | [Privacy Policy](http://www
body:
Peter -- Last year, nearly 68,000 Americans died from drug overdoses. That’s more of our fellow citizens than died during the entire Vietnam War. The good news is that while the fight is far from over, **we have started to turn the corner** here in Ohio. We saw a 22% reduction in the number of overdose deaths in 2018 as compared to the year before. In 2016, Congress passed my Comprehensive Addiction and Recovery Act (CARA). Last year, **President Trump signed my STOP Act into law** to help crack down on illegal substances like **fentanyl** from being shipped to the United States **from places like China** through the U.S. mail system. And Congress is providing a record amount of assistance to states and treatment providers to help combat the opioid epidemic. In recent months, we have seen a big shift from opioids to other drugs like methamphetamine and cocaine, and the federal government needs to give states more flexibility to use that federal funding to address the changing face of addiction. That’s why I have introduced the **Combating Meth & Cocaine Act**, which would do just that. Thanks for your continued support as I continue working with the Trump Administration to help our fellow Ohioans battling the disease of addiction. All best, Rob Portman P.S. - If you'd like to help us keep the momentum going, **please[donate, $20, $50, or $100](https://www.robportman.com/donation_v2?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=191209_fighting_addiction&n=1) today** to help us continue to get things done for the people of Ohio. [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sYYV_ledEgoYeQO-o30kdJeTLiOkPFE0-_P396RlgQw&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=191209_fighting_addiction&n=2)[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Tgt5i9qzFHm-zEGuH8vKJ58&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=191209_fighting_addiction&n=3)[

](https://www.robportman.com/donate?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=191209_fighting_addiction&n=4)

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.robportman.com/unsubscribe?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=191209_fighting_addiction&n=5).

You can also keep up with Rob Portman on [Twitter](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNFH-_6OxP5XDDu7-tGRxb-c&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=191209_fighting_addiction&n=6) or [Facebook](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sYYV_ledEgoYeQO-o30kdIFdWO15ZZgfTH4Suo9WAEj&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=191209_fighting_addiction&n=7).

name: Ben Salango for Governor
subject: Show up or the job doesn't get done
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/78839/images/Salango%20Logo%20PMS%20Reversed%20Op%201.png]
Friend,
I learned at an early age that you need to show up or the job doesn't get done.
Right now, West Virginia has a governor who doesn't show up to work. It's why our state is a mess!
I watched how hard my parents worked to make their small business a success, and I learned the value of showing up when I earned my union card bagging groceries at Kroger. I've never missed a commission meeting while serving Kanawha County commissioner.
I'm running to be a full-time governor and to invest in our public schools, fix our roads, create jobs, and end the opioid epidemic.
Will you join our campaign with a small donation? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1209showup]
As I travel the state, it's clear that change is in the air. Working families know that we can do better than a deadbeat governor who doesn't pay his bills or show up to work.
I hope to see you soon on the campaign trail.
Sincerely,
Ben
P.S. I'm a life-long Democrat running to bring fresh ideas to the governor's office. Can you chip in $10 now and help push our campaign forward? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1209showup]

Ben Salango for West Virginia
PO Box 11650
Charleston, WV 25339
United States

subject: Confirmation #252485 for dpwillis67@gmail.com
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
Will you take my Official Democratic Survey and help Speaker Pelosi and me lead Democrats through this historic chapter? We are truly relying on your feedback to shape our path forward. >>
---
| | | I just launched the most consequential survey of my entire career. Speaker Pelosi and I need feedback from 10,000 strong Democrats to help us shape our path forward. [**_10,000 RESPONSES NEEDED: Speaker Pelosi is now guiding us through one of the most pivotal chapters in our country 's history. Will you take 30 seconds to complete my Official Democratic Survey to help us chart our path forward? We're relying on your feedback more than you know. >>_**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7c0/18e32a7f/504b82b1/7b22a455/982230182/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/democratic-leadership-survey?source=20191209_em_pet_b1_lujan_all") ****NAME** : **dpwillis67@gmail.com **RESPONSE:** #252485 **** **** | ********[TAKE THE SURVEY >>](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7c0/18e32a7f/504b82b1/7b22a455/982230182/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/democratic-leadership-survey?source=20191209_em_pet_b1_lujan_all")********
---

I need you to know 3 critical things:

1. Speaker Pelosi is now leading us through one of the most pivotal chapters in our country's history.

2. I know she's relying on feedback from our best Democrats to shape our path forward.

3. So I just launched my Official Democratic Survey. I need 10,000 responses before midnight to get an accurate sample size.

[**_I 'm asking because this moment is absolutely critical: Will you take my Official Democratic Survey and help Speaker Pelosi and me lead Democrats through this historic chapter? We are truly relying on your feedback to shape our path forward. >>_**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7c0/18e32a7f/504b82b1/7b22a455/982230182/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/democratic-leadership-survey?source=20191209_em_pet_b1_lujan_all")

Thank you for your voice,

Ben Ray Lujan
Assistant Speaker

name: Mark Warner
subject: No more government shutdowns [Sign my petition]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
We have just 11 days until government funding runs out, and if the President doesn't make a deal soon, we could face another government shutdown disaster. Already this President has begun hinting that
|
---
| | Derek,

We have just 11 days until government funding runs out, and if the President doesn't make a deal soon, we could face another government shutdown disaster. Already this President has begun hinting that he may try to use a shutdown to get more funding for his wall or to stop the House's impeachment proceedings. For the sake of our country and our federal workers and contractors, in particular, I hope that's not true.

But I have to tell you, I think it's just plain stupid that politicians can shut down the government in the first place. That's why I introduced legislation called the "Stop Shutdowns Transferring Unnecessary Pain and Inflicting Damage in the Coming Years Act" or Stop STUPIDITY Act. This legislation, whose name my staff clearly worked really hard on, is simple:

If the White House and Congress can't reach a deal to fund the government, then Congress and the White House shut down until they figure it out. The rest of our government stays open. Federal workers and contractors will no longer be treated as bargaining chips. They'll continue to work hard and earn their paychecks, while the politicians and their staff go without pay until they do their jobs and fund the government.

Frankly, I think this legislation is long overdue. And as we inch dangerously closer to another shutdown, I think the time to pass it is now. If you agree that we need to keep our government open and stop the STUPIDITY of these pointless shutdowns, will you sign my petition and demand Congress pass the Stop STUPIDITY Act today? **[Sign My Petition >>>](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d753/53d9897e/53e4af2f/1c89f0d6/471869877/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-stopstupidityact")** You have my word that I'm going to do everything in my power to avoid another shutdown at the end of this month. And while I'm at it, I'm going to be pushing my colleagues to end these pointless and harmful shutdowns once and for all.

**[>>> Add your name to support the Stop STUPIDITY Act today.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d753/53d9897e/53e4af2f/1c89f0d6/471869877/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-stopstupidityact")**

Thanks,
Mark Warner | **[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d753/53d9897e/53e4af2f/1c89f0d5/471869877/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM3NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20191209_s_1_fl__376__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d753/53d9897e/53e4af2f/1c89f0d4/471869877/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: MSNBC: Trump approval falling in Midwest swing states
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, MSNBC just reported new polling data from across the country, and Trump's job approval rating is rapidly sinking in Pennsylvania, Wisconsin, and Michigan \-- key swing states in 2020. In all three states, his net approval is down by at least 17 points! This could be a game-changing moment for Democrats as we get ready for primaries season and selecting a nominee to defeat Trump. In order to drive this momentum into victory in 2020, we need to update our data on where voters stand: **Do you approve of Donald Trump?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdca5/6e9863e8/171648ef/1db0bb99/4240982496/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/wrkRaFoQ") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdca5/6e9863e8/171648ef/1db0bb99/4240982496/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/wrkRaFoQ") Thank you so much for your participation. -WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdca5/6e9863e8/171648ef/1db0bb98/4240982496/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191209b.ND&refcode2=BnOylGZWZgw2u7BIk8e3")

subject: Adiós Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |

| | As more evidence shows that Stephen Miller, Trump's top aide, used White Supremacist websites to design the administration's immigration policies, we can't take our eyes off of Trump's cruelty and must remind ourselves that there will be life after Trump.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

name: Mike Turner
subject: FWD: Tell Adam Schiff stop this partisan impeachment!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CITIZENS FOR TURNER
body:
This message contains graphics. If you do not see the graphics, [click here to view](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/MailView?ms=NDEyOTI4OTES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&j=MTY2MDg0MjA5OAS2&mt=1&rt=0).

I believe in transparency, and Peter, you're not going to like this.
If you would prefer not to receive future emails, [visit here.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=25&ms=NDEyOTI4OTES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDg0MjA5OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[ ](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=27&ms=NDEyOTI4OTES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDg0MjA5OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Peter,
[_**Did you get the chance to read this email from my team yesterday?**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=NDEyOTI4OTES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDg0MjA5OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
I'm reaching out to make sure you're aware of where your taxpayer dollars are going. I believe in transparency, and Peter, you're not going to like this. [_**Adam Schiff 's sham impeachment is being funded by YOUR hard earned dollars**_ _**!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=NDEyOTI4OTES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDg0MjA5OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
This kind of government spending and waste is exactly what I'm fighting against as your representative!
Obstructionists Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi are pushing through this partisan impeachment, and they are perfectly fine with continuing to spend taxpayer money to fuel this partisan impeachment inquiry.
[_**If you 're also upset by this, click here to send Adam Schiff a loud and clear message that what he's doing has to STOP! **_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=23&ms=NDEyOTI4OTES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDg0MjA5OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[_**ACT NOW: Tell Adam Schiff "No Impeachment">>> **_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=29&ms=NDEyOTI4OTES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDg0MjA5OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
It's time Adam Schiff stops wasting YOUR money to fund impeachment and allow Congress to get back to doing its job.
[_**Tell Schiff NO IMPEACHMENT! Sign our Petition today! >>> **_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=NDEyOTI4OTES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDg0MjA5OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
We simply cannot afford to let our taxpayer dollars continue to be wasted on this failed impeachment inquiry.
Thank you,

Mike Turner
**[**Sign our petition!**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=NDEyOTI4OTES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDg0MjA5OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)**
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Rob, Team Turner
Date: Sun, Dec 8, 2019 at 6:15 PM
Subject: Tell Adam Schiff stop this partisan impeachment!
Peter,
The calendar has turned to December and wouldn't you know it, Adam Schiff is staying the course on his partisan impeachment inquiry against President Trump!
And now Schiff and Nancy Pelosi are proceeding forward, enlisting Jerry Nadler to move forward with their impeachment demands.
[_**Here 's the bottom line: we need your help to put a stop to this! **_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=NDEyOTI4OTES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDg0MjA5OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
We're reaching out to patriots just like you, Peter, to join us and send Schiff a loud and clear message that this must end!
[_**ACT NOW: Tell Adam Schiff "No Impeachment">>> **_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=28&ms=NDEyOTI4OTES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDg0MjA5OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
It's time Schiff stops this partisan impeachment inquiry and allows Congress to get back to doing its job to move American forward.
[_**Tell Schiff NO IMPEACHMENT! Sign the Petition today! >>> **_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=NDEyOTI4OTES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDg0MjA5OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
House leadership, behind Pelosi and Schiff, continues to derail progress and refuses to do anything other than obstruction. The Miami Valley and Southwest Ohio cannot afford to let their taxpayer dollars continue to be wasted on this impeachment mess.
Stand with Mike Turner and Ohio patriots like you to tell Schiff - [_**NO to IMPEACHMENT!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=NDEyOTI4OTES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDg0MjA5OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Rob, Team Turner

name: Nikki Foster
subject: I'm ashamed of my representative
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Foster for Ohio
body:
|
---
[ ](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732cf35/30a4f917/50945cba/28ced850/2451679141/VEsH/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fos_monthly_template?refcode=fos_header_logo&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191209_Hearings3_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191209_Hearings3_U1_X1")

| | You can disagree with someone on policy platforms, but still respect them and see them as an honorable person. But after Republican Steve Chabot's handling of the impeachment hearing, I have lost any remaining respect I held for him. He repeated inflammatory partisan talking points rather than questioning the constitutional scholars in front of him. He ignored mountains of evidence to blindly defend the leader of his party. And most importantly -- he is prioritizing his short-sighted defense of Donald Trump over our own national security and his oath to our country. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - You can disagree with someone on policy platforms, but still respect them and see them as an honorable person. **But after Republican Steve Chabot 's handling of the impeachment hearing, I have lost any remaining respect I held for him.** He repeated inflammatory partisan talking points rather than questioning the constitutional scholars in front of him. He ignored mountains of evidence to blindly defend the leader of his party. And most importantly -- **he is prioritizing his short-sighted defense of Donald Trump over our own national security and his oath to our country.** A man willing to do all that in a situation like this does not belong in Congress. [**That 's why I'm humbly asking for you to chip in to my campaign to defeat him and restore dignity to federal office ->**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_hearings?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191209_Hearings3_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=2+-+Thatrsquos+why+Irsquom+humbly+asking+for&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191209_Hearings3_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191209_Hearings3_U1_X1") | | | [Chip in](https://go.nikkifosteroh.?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_hearings?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191209_Hearings3_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=3+-+Chip+in&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191209_Hearings3_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191209_Hearings3_U1_X1")
---
I swore an oath to support and defend the Constitution when I joined the US Air Force. **Steve Chabot took a similar oath when he was sworn into Congress -- and we watched him forsake it live on national television.**
The fact remains that the President stands accused, with much evidence supporting the accusation, **of bribing a foreign government to help him personally and politically.**
Our Constitution is crystal clear that this is an impeachable offense. And Steve Chabot has worked in government long enough to know that simple fact -- **he 's just choosing to ignore it.**
I've had enough. [**Will you chip in to my campaign to send him packing in 2020?**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_hearings?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191209_Hearings3_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=4+-+Will+you+chip+in+to+my+campaign+to+send+&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191209_Hearings3_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191209_Hearings3_U1_X1")

clean_body: | "" | | You can disagree with someone on policy platforms, but still respect them and see them as an honorable person. But after Republican Steve Chabot's handling of the impeachment hearing, I have lost any remaining respect I held for him. He repeated inflammatory partisan talking points rather than questioning the constitutional scholars in front of him. He ignored mountains of evidence to blindly defend the leader of his party. And most importantly -- he is prioritizing his short-sighted defense of Donald Trump over our own national security and his oath to our country. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - You can disagree with someone on policy platforms, but still respect them and see them as an honorable person. But after Republican Steve Chabot 's handling of the impeachment hearing, I have lost any remaining respect I held for him. He repeated inflammatory partisan talking points rather than questioning the constitutional scholars in front of him. He ignored mountains of evidence to blindly defend the leader of his party. And most importantly -- he is prioritizing his short-sighted defense of Donald Trump over our own national security and his oath to our country. A man willing to do all that in a situation like this does not belong in Congress. "" | | | "" I swore an oath to support and defend the Constitution when I joined the US Air Force. Steve Chabot took a similar oath when he was sworn into Congress -- and we watched him forsake it live on national television. The fact remains that the President stands accused, with much evidence supporting the accusation, of bribing a foreign government to help him personally and politically. Our Constitution is crystal clear that this is an impeachable offense. And Steve Chabot has worked in government long enough to know that simple fact -- he 's just choosing to ignore it. I've had enough. "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" I won't let this happen. name: Ed Markey
subject: Will you make a donation to help me to continue my focus on the work you expect me to do?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
This is an important month for our campaign's fundraising. | |
---
| Friends -

This is an important month for our campaign's fundraising.

As you may know, the end of the year marks a major FEC deadline for our campaign. That'll be our chance to show the strength of our grassroots campaign.

**[It'd mean a lot to me if you could make a $3 donation to my campaign. It would send a powerful message to those looking to defeat our progressive movement that we are up for the fight.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df21/693b8b0a/43b18ab2/72de7c2f/3070653950/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMDktZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-december?refcode=em191209-full")**

With the impeachment hearings quickly proceeding, it's more important than ever to have people like you powering our campaign.

It looks like the House will vote to impeach the president before the end of the year. Then it is onto the Senate to have a trial -- likely in January.

This is a history-defining moment for our country, and it demands our full attention. As a Senator, I'll be a juror. It's our job to uphold the Constitution and defend our democracy.

This moment demands my full attention, so I can do the work you expect me to do.

**[Will you make a $3 donation today to help me to continue my focus on the work you expect me to do? I would not ask if it were not important.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df21/693b8b0a/43b18ab2/72de7c2f/3070653950/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMDktZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-december?refcode=em191209-full")**

Thank you,

Ed
**[DONATE](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df21/693b8b0a/43b18ab2/72de7c2f/3070653950/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMDktZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-december?refcode=em191209-full")**

---

| | Paid for by The Markey Committee
---

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Today, I'm introducing the most comprehensive plan to end poverty as we know it in the United States
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Team, as president I will lead from the White House with one central question in mind: **Will this help or hurt the next generation?**

I've seen the devastating effects poverty has on kids and their families.

One out of every eight Americans--about 40 million people, including nearly 10 million children--live in poverty. **Our child poverty rate is among the highest of any advanced economy, and child poverty alone costs the United States between $800 billion and $1.1 trillion each year.**

I have a plan to change that (which you can read [here](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba96e/134673f2/90e93eb/6997b46b/2761576876/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://michaelbennet.com/poverty/")).

Here's what we're going to do:

* Cut child poverty in half by the end of my first year in office
* Cut adult poverty in half by the end of my first term
* Eliminate homelessness by the end of my second term
* Put America on the path to completely eliminate poverty within a generation

[Following this policy rollout, I received the endorsement of Billy Shore, founder of Share Our Strength, a national nonprofit focused on ending childhood hunger in America.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba96e/134673f2/90e93eb/6997b46a/2761576876/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/end_poverty_plan?source=EM_PET_B1_120919_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

Here's what Billy had to say:

_" At the end of the day, what's most important is not what Michael Bennet says about this plan, but what this plan says about Michael Bennet. There is no other candidate in this race who has the experience or commitment to actually make progress for kids and families across the country--especially those living in poverty."_
[Team, it's plans and endorsements like these that separate our team from the rest of the pack.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba96e/134673f2/90e93eb/6997b46a/2761576876/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/end_poverty_plan?source=EM_PET_B1_120919_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

[We're building a movement to eliminate poverty and create an economy that works for all of us, but I can't do it alone. Will you stand with me and Billy? Add your name below and let's get to work!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba96e/134673f2/90e93eb/6997b46a/2761576876/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/end_poverty_plan?source=EM_PET_B1_120919_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

---
| | [ADD MY NAME: END POVERTY IN AMERICA >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba96e/134673f2/90e93eb/6997b46a/2761576876/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/end_poverty_plan?source=EM_PET_B1_120919_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")
---
Thank you,

Michael

P.S. If you want to read more about this plan and how it will tackle these issues, click here: [https://michaelbennet.com/poverty/](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba96e/134673f2/90e93eb/6997b46b/2761576876/VEsA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://michaelbennet.com/poverty/")

---

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Be a Founding Partner of this campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
Before our first full fundraising quarter of this campaign comes to an end, I'd like to personally invite you to be a Founding Partner of what we're building. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771433/691c9bd/6fa07150/11a7ced1/2382792587/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-dec?refcode=em_template")
---
| Team--whatever I've accomplished in life, I did it with the encouragement, the collaboration, and the generosity of others.

When we started the Wynkoop Brewing Company in 1988, we were a group of beer enthusiasts restoring the J.S. Brown building in downtown Denver, calling in favors from our friends, our families, our colleagues, and anyone else who'd stake a bet on us.

We sold 6,000 pints of beer at pre-Prohibition prices on opening night: 25 cents a pop.

A few years later when we opened the Phantom Brewing Company in Colorado Springs, it wasn't due to the help of big investors. In fact, they all passed on the project. Instead, it was everyday people who each had a little drop of faith and chipped in to become partners in the enterprise.

I just had a beer at Phantom a few weeks ago, team, and it tasted just as good as ever.

I've seen the power of partnership and collaboration when it comes to making things happen.

[**_Before our first full fundraising quarter of this campaign comes to a close, I 'd like to personally invite you to be a Founding Partner--someone building this campaign from the ground up. Will you chip in today?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-foundingpartner?refcode=em_fr_20191209_JH_20191209-fr-JH-foundingpartner-2mo_ndnr_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

The challenge we're taking on is far from easy.

Cory Gardner has some interested partners, too--dark money groups connected to the Koch network, shady organizations tied to Mitch McConnell, and of course the national Republican Party. They're his partners--and they'll do everything they can to hang on to this seat.

We're looking for people to get in on the ground floor of our effort to make this the end of Gardner's tenure and McConnell's majority.

**A donation isn 't just a dollar here--it's a gesture of faith in the future we can build for Colorado, together. **[**_Will you become a Founding Partner now?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-foundingpartner?refcode=em_fr_20191209_JH_20191209-fr-JH-foundingpartner-2mo_ndnr_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Thank you,
John [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-foundingpartner?refcode=em_fr_20191209_JH_20191209-fr-JH-foundingpartner-2mo_2mo_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---

P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper for Colorado team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771433/691c9bd/6fa07150/11a7cecb/2382792587/VEsB/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771433/691c9bd/6fa07150/11a7cec8/2382792587/VEsO/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771433/691c9bd/6fa07150/11a7cec9/2382792587/VEsP/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771433/691c9bd/6fa07150/11a7cec6/2382792587/VEsHBQ/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771433/691c9bd/6fa07150/11a7cec7/2382792587/VEsHBA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771433/691c9bd/6fa07150/11a7cec4/2382792587/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). If you'd like to receive only the most important campaign updates, [**_click here_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771433/691c9bd/6fa07150/11a7cec5/2382792587/VEsHBg/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/id-like-to-get-less-email?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please update your information [_**here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771433/691c9bd/6fa07150/11a7cecb/2382792587/VEsHAQ/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer").
