A few years later when we opened the Phantom Brewing Company in Colorado Springs, it wasn't due to the help of big investors. In fact, they all passed on the project. Instead, it was everyday people who each had a little drop of faith and chipped in to become partners in the enterprise. I just had a beer at Phantom a few weeks ago, team, and it tasted just as good as ever. I've seen the power of partnership and collaboration when it comes to making things happen. "=" The challenge we're taking on is far from easy. Cory Gardner has some interested partners, too--dark money groups connected to the Koch network, shady organizations tied to Mitch McConnell, and of course the national Republican Party. They're his partners--and they'll do everything they can to hang on to this seat. We're looking for people to get in on the ground floor of our effort to make this the end of Gardner's tenure and McConnell's majority. A donation isn 't just a dollar here--it's a gesture of faith in the future we can build for Colorado, together. "=" Thank you, John "=" | | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218 Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible. If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper for Colorado team by "". Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on "", "", "", and "". We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe "". If you'd like to receive only the most important campaign updates, "". If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please update your information "".

name: Jay Inslee
subject: We can't fall short before the freeze.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Friday's deadline is looming.
| | [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8125?t=3&akid=8004%2E868730%2E8JM0Ys) | [CONTRIBUTE!](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8125?t=4&akid=8004%2E868730%2E8JM0Ys)
---
Friend,
This is the last week I can accept donations of any kind for more than three months. My opponents don't have that restriction whatsoever -- and the Republican Governors Association has millions of dollars on hand to help any or all of them try to chip away at our progress.
That's why this deadline matters:**Frid ay at midnight, all fundraising stops.** My opponents will just keep accepting donations hand-over-fist while we're hard at work during the legislative session.
[**That's why we need to raise $50,000 before Friday's midnight deadline: We're well on our way to hitting our goal, but we're not there yet. Will you donate $1 or more right now?**](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8125?t=6&akid=8004%2E868730%2E8JM0Ys)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$1 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8126?t=7&akid=8004%2E868730%2E8JM0Ys)
---
| | [$10 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8127?t=8&akid=8004%2E868730%2E8JM0Ys)
---
| [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8128?t=9&akid=8004%2E868730%2E8JM0Ys)
---
| | [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8129?t=10&akid=8004%2E868730%2E8JM0Ys)
---
| [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8130?t=11&akid=8004%2E868730%2E8JM0Ys)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8131?t=12&akid=8004%2E868730%2E8JM0Ys)
---
I'm so proud of the work we're doing here in Washington state: We're taking monumental steps to set the foundation for the next generation of progressive leaders and the future of the climate movement.
We have to be bold to make real progress, and that's exactly what we're doing. Like Greta Thunberg has said for months now, the climate crisis is a moral outrage -- and it's up to each of us to do something about it. From my seat leading Washington state, we're taking some of the most progressive steps to fight this crisis while improving people's lives. But if I lose this election, we'll lose that progress.
**$50,000 will go a long way to fuel the fight in the months ahead when we can't raise any campaign contributions -- that's why I'm asking, because this is so important:**
[**Will you donate $1 or more before Friday's freeze deadline? We're well on our way to our goal, but we simply can't fall short here -- every dollar makes a difference.**](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8125?t=14&akid=8004%2E868730%2E8JM0Ys)
Very truly yours,
Jay
[CONTRIBUTE!](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8125?t=15&akid=8004%2E868730%2E8JM0Ys)

name: Tom Steyer
subject: The climate crisis disproportionately impacts communities of color
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
I use the term “climate justice” a lot, friend, and I wanted to take a moment to tell you why. **Climate justice acknowledges that the people hit first and worst by the climate crisis are not the ones causing it. The worst of America’s pollution has been placed disproportionately by the fossil fuel industry into communities of color.** Big corporations continue to treat low-income communities, communities of color, and vulnerable rural communities as dumping grounds for their environmental waste for greater profit — and they’ve been allowed to get away with it. American land-use and environmental policies have historically been intentionally racist and discriminatory, and continue to result in environmental and health inequity. [_**Add your name if you agree that justice needs to be front and center as we work toward a sustainable future.**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBguGO1iUd2XLcKbWoq181-2BVVLOtaNLr14-2FwdCYNq-2Fb4lTCo2j4nYBVxda29BD9oMW26XI5tjleNNx2YxDAGD34p-2Foesr2b4uT9c3Bd-2FFvkA2qWMuF-2B4XygCdidiio-2Fl2-2B6mnQs7HFo1pAAJG6eKrfUfXBzQf9HTZfVeu06h1jTxYFWGUiOo7k0oZULE5GKwUFA-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFd-2Bqq2-2FsB1tRjdFuf71-2FioHQyO-2F0tACRZpuZ7L-2FtZJDR6-2BLwVFj8e5buXBXddKHS5pk-2F-2BYVDVbTlPFkXySXS9RlRkgvbMfgQU4pS2lIRkjp8rNgVCKArqYF9tIhRxH500ujND-2BxLHaWBYbdCwO3bg9crlV7E7nmc7pgwffq20veveInDaAbVLM-2FaSSJD9Tw3B9RAxJMwtS5wgj0o264ZR54-2FBQgBEgvWrFKEccIkYs8l3Gv7isVghnYFCK-2FTSG8f6nkqKxr0vrt-2ByV2HQ3kbzP5p1VnExsvE00pILGLB0uUEVJ7fpGQeRldF-2BdjciJ-2FR7iNVUkqoVr-2FHNs3lXL31zRyyKMjmY28tQLGjz-2FKkG-2BZW7e2JRVvyo-2BddhLShCQZ80Y-3D) Climate change directly affects so many of the other challenges we face as a country. Our access to health care, affordable housing, and job opportunities are changing with our environment. For many, coping with those changes puts them at a serious disadvantage. Regardless of who you’re voting for, you’re living on this planet and you’re going to feel the effects of the climate crisis. And if we’re going to address this crisis and create a healthy country, we have to start by recognizing that it’s hurting low-income communities and communities of color more than others. Climate justice is central to my strategy to preserve our planet, address historic inequities, and grow our economy in a way that serves the American people instead of corporations. [_**Read more about why I advocate for climate justice here, and join the conversation.**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBguGO1iUd2XLcKbWoq181-2BVVLOtaNLr14-2FwdCYNq-2Fb4lTCo2j4nYBVxda29BD9oMW26XI5tjleNNx2YxDAGD34p-2Foesr2b4uT9c3Bd-2FFvkA2qWMuF-2B4XygCdidiio-2Fl2-2B6mnQs7HFo1pAAJG6eKrfUfXBzQf9HTZfVeu06h1jTxYFWGUiOo7k0oZULE5GKwUFA-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFd-2Bqq2-2FsB1tRjdFuf71-2FioHQyO-2F0tACRZpuZ7L-2FtZJDR6-2BLwVFj8e5buXBXddKHS5pk-2F-2BYVDVbTlPFkXySXS9RlRkgvbMfgQU4pS2lIRkjp8rNgVCKArqYF9tIhRxH500ujND-2BxLHaWBYbdCwO3bg9clFxbOIZvu-2Bn-2FDPT7cRd4T883Kko3hte-2FVkIt2eOKGR0nGB05YVPOO2WF1-2BGHYHmF6LkJci-2BctRnCq-2BhU55mwB4QkEwOJBPvvzfnlqOy3MiC5UH7jwpxBImDxZMOiI9cwJMuv1vh5GRwiYJVZ4oPE2EpdxgmTlKpj6dcm-2Fa0HZGTSMgxr89h7kPaoYTycOe11pRkhzKPbnJaV4zmtXCSH-2B-2Fmo0xKw-2FR-2BBOAlxtgkzgWo-3D) Yours in the fight,
Tom

clean_body: | | | | I use the term “climate justice” a lot, friend, and I wanted to take a moment to tell you why. Climate justice acknowledges that the people hit first and worst by the climate crisis are not the ones causing it. The worst of America’s pollution has been placed disproportionately by the fossil fuel industry into communities of color. Big corporations continue to treat low-income communities, communities of color, and vulnerable rural communities as dumping grounds for their environmental waste for greater profit — and they’ve been allowed to get away with it. American land-use and environmental policies have historically been intentionally racist and discriminatory, and continue to result in environmental and health inequity. Climate change directly affects so many of the other challenges we face as a country. Our access to health care, affordable housing, and job opportunities are changing with our environment. For many, coping with those changes puts them at a serious disadvantage. Regardless of who you’re voting for, you’re living on this planet and you’re going to feel the effects of the climate crisis. And if we’re going to address this crisis and create a healthy country, we have to start by recognizing that it’s hurting low-income communities and communities of color more than others. Climate justice is central to my strategy to preserve our planet, address historic inequities, and grow our economy in a way that serves the American people instead of corporations. Yours in the fight, Tom | [PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]() We want to make sure you're receiving relevant information about this movement. If you'd like to learn more about volunteering for Tom's campaign, . If you'd like to stay up to date with Tom on the road, make sure to follow him on , , and . If you'd rather not receive emails from us, you can unsubscribe by clicking = — we'll be sad to see you go! Tom Steyer 2020 · PO Box 626 · San Francisco, CA 94104 · USA

# Campaign Highlights & Happenings
[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23RnSat4TMYqqOIv68rWpj3Sofav5d_Pvs2wIP4cfL1fpWWeLqZnpY25NlzKdjMfI0&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191209_newsletter&n=2)
### [**_Ballot Access: We are officially on the ballot in SEVEN states and have submitted paperwork for an additional five states!_**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23RnSat4TMYqqOIv68rWpj3Sofav5d_Pvs2wIP4cfL1fln6Ni6M6Wd8HhhSRB_KRYk&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191209_newsletter&n=3)
We are now on the ballot in Alabama, Arkansas, Florida, Michigan, New Hampshire, Tennessee, and Utah and are submitting paperwork for Colorado, Idaho, and Texas today! We are still waiting to hear the official word that we are on the ballot in California and North Carolina, which were submitted over the past few weeks. Next up are Ohio, Vermont, and Maine! | | [SUPPORT BILL →](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23RnSat4TMYqqOIv68rWpj3Sofav5d_Pvs2wIP4cfL1fpWWeLqZnpY25NlzKdjMfI0&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191209_newsletter&n=4)

## In the News: A Few of This Week's Stories
### Fox News: _Republican Bill Weld says he can beat Trump in at least five states on Super Tuesday._
"As House Democrats ramp-up phase two of their impeachment inquiry, Bill Weld, former two-time Massachusetts governor and Republican 2020 presidential candidate, said Wednesday that he believes he can beat President Trump in five states on Super Tuesday."

[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=KVYzWTFUuJ0SsyVZLAg-7OXbIC9LsmpEVVpVOdL0NPEh00NX34_vl9ALj-xW5HsGw88woOlmYLgf32_Em1GdkK1Ou0tE7vRpdpQjZZWMUHISmivCPTfuo7QN5xMhcxsQQqBdQtF77jmShIwt6Ja7_A&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191209_newsletter&n=5)
### Breitbart: _Bill Weld Says He Can Beat Trump in 3-5 Super Tuesday States._
"Appearing this week on the Fox News Rundown podcast, 2020 Republican presidential candidate and former Gov. Bill Weld (R-MA) asserted he can top President Donald Trump in at least five states on Super Tuesday."

[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=s24IZE3rULlhCWzRMLn9n-lEXwrx_CK0sP5OiO-VcvqkTNrgsct8VTb8SVhQka7l5gpwHiUGgKHs59zNqj2nTRoPNJsdsOXMIuMUfWvu3C6nQSEYn-Lkv2q0z2VOD-eT4tt0AhW8JpvMXx6wkxgYiQ&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191209_newsletter&n=6)
### ABC News: _Bill Weld: Everything you need to know about the 2020 presidential candidate._
"Former two-term Massachusetts Gov. Bill Weld became the first Republican to mount a long-shot primary challenge against President Donald Trump. He announced his candidacy for president on April 15, 2019. The 2016 Libertarian vice presidential candidate told ABC News he would have been "ashamed" if he'd passed up on running against the president for the Republican nomination."

[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=cTomZN3YTronSSAYl7jqNURytNlqhXOR2GwP-G9cfNlWZr5maEOian_q4vipCyv8DOD964MH02tJ1MyK8aiCRmT4kuvBbnnbZ3eruGq8Bg93LYWpZxbxlvt6M6K_lFr9&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191209_newsletter&n=7)
### The Mercury News: _Letter: If you’re a true Republican, vote Bill Weld._
“If you’re an independent who believes in fiscal conservatism, live-and-let-live social policies and strong environmental protection, you should also look into Weld’s record. If you are a Democrat who just wants the satisfaction of casting a direct vote against Trump, here’s your chance. Anyone can re-register as a Republican voter, even at the polls on Election Day. Vote Bill Weld.”

[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=TT7KjOcMNQ_0USUgjbUFSBLHqqLfKH5QTUz7du6I3hzginmX16X_kg6qof0SmuhUwxyWXWIuzKkUieI2_vArFUdHChpOuy5zTVEUlvmCLjXhXJ2TxBhL3i3VwtN_iTJQ&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191209_newsletter&n=8)
### Newsweek:_TRUMP CHALLENGER BILL WELD ON SECRET SENATE ANTI-TRUMPERS AND AG BARR'S EXTREME VIEWS ON EXECUTIVE BRANCH POWER_
“Everybody, well most everybody, knows former Massachusetts Governor William Weld has mounted a primary challenge against Donald Trump along with ex-Teaparty Congressman Joe Walsh from Illinois”

[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7EL176YFyxKF3ox3wD2rUZdX8Fs68Y4R24IGh_R_8gXhcDnIf7iPRr1RDSCYWF5_zBjxVtY_iBfEnSBr7Gd52Jm351QjdGqt5puNT46fZ1T-y1e0fasxX9wHCu4M6_pn&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191209_newsletter&n=9)

subject: Together

body:
We can build the campaign we need to win Texas.

|

| | **It 's official, Peter. I'm running for U.S. Senate!

[Pitch in $3 toward our $10,000 Filing Day goal >>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890909/7f51f7bc/4a436db2/4ef0f7ef/1338293788/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYwMyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-filingdaygoal?refcode=email_20191209.2nd__603__&amount=3&recurring=true")** | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890909/7f51f7bc/4a436db2/4ef0f7ef/1338293788/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYwMyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-filingdaygoal?refcode=email_20191209.2nd__603__&amount=3&recurring=true")
---
I know that together we can win this race, but we absolutely have to keep our momentum. We're just over two months from the primary, and now's the time to show that our campaign is strong enough to take on Senator Cornyn.

**That 's why we've set a Filing Day Goal to raise $10,000 -- so we can _officially_ start this campaign strong and keep building until November! [Will you donate $3 right now to help us get there?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890909/7f51f7bc/4a436db2/4ef0f7ef/1338293788/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYwMyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-filingdaygoal?refcode=email_20191209.2nd__603__&amount=3&recurring=true")**

I'm so proud of all this campaign has accomplished so far. Because of your support, we've been able to travel more than 10,000 miles across Texas, meet with thousands of voters, and raise more than $2 million to lay the foundation for the Texas-sized campaign we need to win!

_The Washington Post_ ranked Texas' Senate seat as one of the top ten most likely to flip! **[If you're ready to make it happen, pitch in before midnight to help reach our $10,000 Filing Day Goal!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890909/7f51f7bc/4a436db2/4ef0f7ef/1338293788/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYwMyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-filingdaygoal?refcode=email_20191209.2nd__603__&amount=3&recurring=true")**

Thanks for all that you do,
MJ Hegar

[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890909/7f51f7bc/4a436db2/4ef0f7ee/1338293788/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYwMyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-filingdaygoal?refcode=email_20191209.2nd__603__&amount=10&recurring=true")

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Teachers' unions keep striking, but the government won't listen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, For the past several years, teachers' unions across the country have been going on strike to protest stagnated pay, budget cuts, and ballooning class sizes. They are fed up with state legislatures that don't value the critical work they do and treat education budgets as frivolous spending and school kids as political pawns for negotiating. The Trump administration has been noticeably silent on these strikes \-- probably because Trump campaigned on helping workers but has instead stood by while plants close, company profits soar, and workers' rights are being torn to shreds by judges he nominated. Trump even went out of the way to campaign for Matt Bevin, who disparaged the Kentucky teachers when they were on strike and then lost the Kentucky governorship to Democrat Andy Beshear. We want to know what engaged Democratic voters think about this so we can set up our strategy to help workers in the 2020 elections: **Do you stand with teachers?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc8e/6e9863e8/1713858e/1db0bbf4/612602438/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/mpxiqsYK") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc8e/6e9863e8/1713858e/1db0bbf4/612602438/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/mpxiqsYK") When Democrats Turn Out stands with the teachers and all other workers on the picket line \-- because we know that when Democrats organize, we win. -WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc8e/6e9863e8/1713858e/1db0bbfa/612602438/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191209c.ND&refcode2=gScFi3rqDN5us5apNEi2")
---
|

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20LaTurner?=
subject: 🚩BREAKING: Watkins votes to undermine President Trump and Secretary Pompeo's Support for Israel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/478dda9d477d/for-immediate-release-kansas-state-treasurer-jake-laturner-announces-candidacy-for-us-congress-5691993?e=1050d051da)
---
| | | | Friend, Some unfortunate news came out of Washington over the weekend, and we were in such disbelief that it even happened that we wanted to make sure you heard about it too.

Our Republican [_**Congressman Steve Watkins along with only 4 other Republicans joined with Nancy Pelosi, Sharice Davids, Jerry Nadler, Adam Schiff and the Democrat majority in passing a resolution that undercuts President Donald Trump and Secretary Mike Pompeo's recently announced pro-Israel policies.**_](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=e47efe4c46&e=1050d051da)

We sent Watkins to D.C. to fight with, not against, our President.

**This is unacceptable!**

It is particularly offensive that a Congressman from Kansas would take a step like this to undermine the leadership of both Secretary Pompeo and President Trump who continue to stand strong in support of Israel.

You can read the full text of House Resolution 326 [here](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=1015ef1dd8&e=1050d051da). It states that peace between Israel and Palestine should be carried out with [“an end to the [Israeli] occupation, including opposing settlement activity and moves toward unilateral annexation in Palestinian territory.”](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=fc716a2d45&e=1050d051da)
---
| Secretary Pompeo recently went on record stating that the Trump Administration does _**not**_**** oppose Israeli settlements. Watkins vote directly contradicts President Trump and Secretary Pompeo.
---
| | [“Calling the establishment of civilian settlements inconsistent with international law hasn’t worked. It hasn’t advanced the cause of peace. The hard truth is there will never be a judicial resolution to the conflict, and arguments about who is right and wrong as a matter of international law will not bring peace. This is a complex political problem that can only be solved by negotiations between the Israelis and the Palestinians."](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=f9db18336b&e=1050d051da) -Secretary of State Mike Pompeo November 18, 2019
---
| Israel is our biggest ally in the Middle East, and we must have someone in Washington who will fight with President Trump and stand up for Israel.

As a state Senator and currently as Kansas State Treasurer Jake has never backed down on my position to stand with Israel. That's something you can count on.

Hear his speech at last year's Israel Rally at the Kansas Capitol [here:](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=3e8987764f&e=1050d051da)
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=b470cdb682&e=1050d051da)
---
| Would you consider [making a donation today](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=1d48ef0819&e=1050d051da) to Jake LaTurner's campaign for Congress? Let's make sure we have representatives in Washington who truly stand with the President and want to keep Israel as our very important ally in the Middle East.

Yours in the fight,

Team LaTurner
---
| [Donate to Team LaTurner!]( "Donate to Team LaTurner!")
---
| | Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
---
| |
---

*P.O. Box 67237, Topeka, KS 66667

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: We’re launching this today:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
Team -
When I ran for governor in 2018, I faced a nearly impossible task: overcoming systemic voter suppression by a Republican Party that silenced far too many voices.

This level of voter suppression is still happening today. In states across our nation, free and fair elections are under attack.

I waged this fight because I want every voice to be heard and the every eligible vote to be counted. As state Republicans pass legislation limiting that access to the ballot box, our work is more important than ever. **That is why we are coming to you with an important request, Team.**

**[Will you stand with me and the DGA and commit to securing fair elections?](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MTY2OTE1MDcS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDU5NzIzOQS2&mt=1&rt=0)**
| | | [Add your name to secure fair elections](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MTY2OTE1MDcS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDU5NzIzOQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
I know that together we can fight for fair elections and fair maps to protect the voices of voters nationwide. But problems this big need broad solutions, so I am partnering with the DGA and Oregon Governor Kate Brown to launch Every State, Every Vote - a comprehensive program aimed at protecting voters, ending map manipulation, and fixing our nation's broken electoral system.

With your help, we will register every eligible voter, see and hear marginalized communities, and give folks a reason to get out and vote. To do that, I need to know that you are in this fight with me.
**[Team, can I count on your support to achieve free and fair elections?](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MTY2OTE1MDcS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDU5NzIzOQS2&mt=1&rt=0)**
The only way we can stop Republican attempts to hijack our democracy is to make sure every voice counts. Do not let this moment pass us by.

Yours in the fight,
Stacey Abrams

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the DGA email list, [click here](https://www.pages02.net/democraticgovernorsassoc/unsubscribe/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=16691507&spUserID=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&spJobID=MTc4MDU5NzIzOQS2&spReportId=MTc4MDU5NzIzOQS2).

clean_body: Team - When I ran for governor in 2018, I faced a nearly impossible task: overcoming systemic voter suppression by a Republican Party that silenced far too many voices. This level of voter suppression is still happening today. In states across our nation, free and fair elections are under attack. I waged this fight because I want every voice to be heard and the every eligible vote to be counted. As state Republicans pass legislation limiting that access to the ballot box, our work is more important than ever. That is why we are coming to you with an important request, Team. | | | I know that together we can fight for fair elections and fair maps to protect the voices of voters nationwide. But problems this big need broad solutions, so I am partnering with the DGA and Oregon Governor Kate Brown to launch Every State, Every Vote - a comprehensive program aimed at protecting voters, ending map manipulation, and fixing our nation's broken electoral system. With your help, we will register every eligible voter, see and hear marginalized communities, and give folks a reason to get out and vote. To do that, I need to know that you are in this fight with me. The only way we can stop Republican attempts to hijack our democracy is to make sure every voice counts. Do not let this moment pass us by. Yours in the fight, Stacey Abrams

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: NBC News reports "Supreme Court Leaves in Place Kentucky Abortion Law Mandating Ultrasounds"
body:
It's simply cruel.

[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fb9/4bef7a87/6a787653/287fe04a/614080697/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMDktMi1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191209-2-a")
Friends,
Today, the Supreme Court upheld a law requiring Kentucky abortion providers to perform an ultrasound, show it to the patient no matter their wishes, AND play audio of the fetal heartbeat. No exceptions, _not even for cases of rape and incest_.
It's simply cruel. And it happened because anti-choice justices now have a 5-4 majority, thanks to Susan Collins' critical vote to confirm Brett Kavanaugh.
**Despite Kavanaugh 's far-right rulings, Collins still says she doesn't regret her vote to confirm him. If you chip in now, we can make sure we replace her in the Senate:**

If you give now, we will defeat Susan Collins.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fb9/4bef7a87/6a787653/287fe04a/614080697/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMDktMi1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191209-2-a")**

name: Claudia Tenney
subject: Brindisi’s attack on USMCA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia for Congress |
body:
While Anthony Brindisi and House Democrats are obsessing over impeaching President Trump, they’re stalling an important trade deal that could help... | |
---
[ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=4f28907f06944fd0a5be8b2003ca0dac&_e=lg8x5UraXL9gzRk0Z3isUR4zbHnC8wPu6AMq31CEtXNErQF90TLBfnfnQ57vAdjhK2kXRLszLu4hnPNYQiU_5jI9CTQP7dafxOHuhH0aNrseUq0hFgRLi-isIkXdhGo5JqoBmRHcfbPLR2u-xM6cGsB-pOhkK2v6h7h3CtI-NWVR6VzBHdt8wvVbgVlQ1rvGFwSSpD0Wsem0-RYRCJDY1oc2xbaYqzy6V9zfjnKNOtQJ-3kxqq-c4mepqf3hD1R2Bcwr4Pm3zMBsHFFp2pRjYe3IFGQAU7cmvxXUiusmaiaPiPUePXIKSVqaREo-Y_in2Gfkh-ecEYWhcJn_zoysEP0zvvD3qIVq8oDIxCM6QGRCcxPGSQQ1pVbfOdNZGrYnEQFY4CBcz6VbVLwVb5mBH5cA8tUrysDt4Xg-R0HaAOF38uyknQkYfOMgA4FBuvgP)
|
---
Peter,

An important trade deal is being held up in Congress because House Democrats are obsessing over impeaching President Trump instead of fighting for Upstate New York.

The United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement (USMCA) would help level the playing field for our state’s agriculture industry. Our district is suffering while Anthony Brindisi and the other members of the radical Left are too busy focusing on their partisan attacks on the president.

**Add your name to tell them it’s time to pass USMCA now!**
[ **PASS USMCA NOW!** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=4f28907f06944fd0a5be8b2003ca0dac&_e=lg8x5UraXL9gzRk0Z3isUR4zbHnC8wPu6AMq31CEtXNErQF90TLBfnfnQ57vAdjhK2kXRLszLu4hnPNYQiU_5jI9CTQP7dafxOHuhH0aNrseUq0hFgRLi-isIkXdhGo5JqoBmRHcfbPLR2u-xM6cGsB-pOhkK2v6h7h3CtI-NWVR6VzBHdt8wvVbgVlQ1rvGFwSSpD0Wsem0-RYRCJDY1oc2xbaYqzy6V9zfjnKNOtQtr3-L7UxJnHn3e1sc3_vlHBGHbCL0CrnTWOz0lvi97C7iLMNUUTzsvHqeeGiDyM3tnryMgZGjusMH3AExoeO4aZYa64lA0dNr8QqvifdV0R56rPDN74Z6d0j0WRl7RaapdujgFaNRChZ2fPIBnIhpSspLN-_ph0jjgKoNNfXTAhGsfcEflkrrogUuR7zw60Mn37hn9X4CLIUUZlt0qlKh)
Upstate New York’s small businesses are under attack from foreign competitors. Without the USMCA:
* New York’s dairy farmers will lose access to Canada’s market, and be forced to compete with their unfair milk pricing standards
* New York’s auto workers will have to compete with cheap labor from Mexico where the typical worker earns only $2 to $3 an hour
* New York manufacturers could be forced to pay a minimum of $192 million to $1.5 billion in extra taxes when exporting to Canada and Mexico
* The U.S. will lose approximately 176,000 new jobs

We need to help them compete in the world market and continue to fight for Upstate New York’s small business community.

**Will you take a stand for Upstate New York’s small businesses?**
[ **FIGHT FOR SMALL BUSINESSES** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=4f28907f06944fd0a5be8b2003ca0dac&_e=lg8x5UraXL9gzRk0Z3isUR4zbHnC8wPu6AMq31CEtXNErQF90TLBfnfnQ57vAdjhK2kXRLszLu4hnPNYQiU_5jI9CTQP7dafxOHuhH0aNrseUq0hFgRLi-isIkXdhGo5JqoBmRHcfbPLR2u-xM6cGsB-pOhkK2v6h7h3CtI-NWVR6VzBHdt8wvVbgVlQ1rvGFwSSpD0Wsem0-RYRCJDY1oc2xbaYqzy6V9zfjnKNOtSfzU9kReAUOeQnFBCb3cCrRdPnpYwfy-tuv9X81CoWV_sYy8vt5uK3MYERREU6_twejs08GjjkaTOvNjt6wAac_AG_EZJ53r6v3DW5mMJMMOZSWjH-D2_WNvQi0KMcj2xWk6Xx23VsNe1oNuraODcMJgnm6y6qK7SJMrf9VRnNfp16CisXeelMbwja_ZUsd8XN9twc7vx3aUCVhDNU4Xgf)
Peter, I’m sick of Washington liberals and career politicians putting their needs ahead of ours. **Our small businesses are closing left and right, but Anthony Brindisi only cares about this media circus of an impeachment inquiry.**

**[I need you to add your name and tell Anthony Brindisi it’s time to pass USMCA now!](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=4f28907f06944fd0a5be8b2003ca0dac&_e=lg8x5UraXL9gzRk0Z3isUR4zbHnC8wPu6AMq31CEtXNErQF90TLBfnfnQ57vAdjhK2kXRLszLu4hnPNYQiU_5jI9CTQP7dafxOHuhH0aNrseUq0hFgRLi-isIkXdhGo5JqoBmRHcfbPLR2u-xM6cGsB-pOhkK2v6h7h3CtI-NWVR6VzBHdt8wvVbgVlQ1rvGFwSSpD0Wsem0-RYRCJDY1oc2xbaYqzy6V9zfjnKNOtRkfl4GfitVjKZTGw513mzUBA7EXMUs6xMpD4z51mbmcI2lRMS2CC3_bCN38pwN-CB7fMx5FOGft096RNXYXyhfdItp8nIgIPUo7afkY-Jho2LQE6tD8AYu5tOAHjR6CYTa5TQwBzIl-ApAi5SdDUSaujbIxjbwgpWE_nw7ZE3J4DfJ5CtgzzTsy3JAj5B1-6W_6FrWx7d9joaPUa5GguDR)**

clean_body: While Anthony Brindisi and House Democrats are obsessing over impeaching President Trump, they’re stalling an important trade deal that could help... | | | Peter, An important trade deal is being held up in Congress because House Democrats are obsessing over impeaching President Trump instead of fighting for Upstate New York. The United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement (USMCA) would help level the playing field for our state’s agriculture industry. Our district is suffering while Anthony Brindisi and the other members of the radical Left are too busy focusing on their partisan attacks on the president. Add your name to tell them it’s time to pass USMCA now! Upstate New York’s small businesses are under attack from foreign competitors. Without the USMCA: New York’s dairy farmers will lose access to Canada’s market, and be forced to compete with their unfair milk pricing standards New York’s auto workers will have to compete with cheap labor from Mexico where the typical worker earns only $2 to $3 an hour New York manufacturers could be forced to pay a minimum of $192 million to $1.5 billion in extra taxes when exporting to Canada and Mexico The U.S. will lose approximately 176,000 new jobs We need to help them compete in the world market and continue to fight for Upstate New York’s small business community. Will you take a stand for Upstate New York’s small businesses? Peter, I’m sick of Washington liberals and career politicians putting their needs ahead of ours. Our small businesses are closing left and right, but Anthony Brindisi only cares about this media circus of an impeachment inquiry. Thank you, Claudia Tenney | | | Paid for by Claudia for Congress | | PO Box 244 Clinton, NY 13323 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: I'm taking on Betsy DeVos to stop predatory scam colleges
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c479/6cd27893/52d4c751/1587a343/1943439388/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | Scam colleges are wicked: they prey upon belief in the American dream to destroy a family's financial security and future. And yet these predatory colleges are still very real and are too often subsidized by our federal tax dollars. They _claim_ to provide career preparation and training, but are really designed to rake in profits, leaving students with massive debt, worthless degrees, and no hope of digging out. And instead of trying to crack down on these scams, Donald Trump's Secretary of Education, Betsy Devos -- who was invested in a company that profited from student loan defaults -- is rolling back rules intended to hold them accountable. _No more. No way._ **I'm taking on Betsy DeVos to fix this scam college problem.**[**Will you pitch in $3 and help me build our campaign to take her on?**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c479/6cd27893/52d4c751/1587a340/1943439388/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2019-12-09-devosop&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") My plan: close the loopholes. Taxpayers should not finance programs that _claim_ to prepare students for careers in their chosen fields, but are actually unaccredited in those fields and leave students with nothing but debt. **If an institution makes claims it cannot back up, then it should be ineligible for federal financial aid programs. It's that simple.** Congress needs to stand up to these predatory programs that are hurting students and families in communities across America. We must not sit idly by while Trump and DeVos allow this to happen. [**Chip in $3 right now and let's build the movement to stop Betsy DeVos and Donald Trump.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c479/6cd27893/52d4c751/1587a340/1943439388/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2019-12-09-devosop&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") Onward. **_Jeff_** Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c479/6cd27893/52d4c751/1587a341/1943439388/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2019-12-09-devosop&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c479/6cd27893/52d4c751/1587a37e/1943439388/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2019-12-09-devosop&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c479/6cd27893/52d4c751/1587a37f/1943439388/VEsA/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2019-12-09-devosop&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c479/6cd27893/52d4c751/1587a37c/1943439388/VEsB/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2019-12-09-devosop&refcode2=express-buttons")
